ugf_response: , can be seen when we look at how people act when they have some things that seem to go wrong. if someone does something that hurts another person, that thing is usually called a bad thing. it can be as small as hurting one person or letting many people feel pain. but there are times when we must choose between two ways to do what happens. the first way is to do what is right even if it makes things harder for many people. this way of thinking says that we should look at the end of what we do and see if it brings more good than bad to the whole world. the second way is to look at the thing we do itself, not just what comes after it. this way looks at what we do in the middle and what we do not do then. behind these two ways, there are certain things that are always wrong, no matter what the end might be. the first side says that some things are wrong because of what they are, like telling a lie or taking something that belongs to someone else, instead of looking at what or making sure every single part works well. the second side says that we must look at the world that comes from our choices to see if our choice was good or bad. let us say you could save many lives by doing one bad thing to one person, this way of looking at things would tell you to do it... so, the hard question is whether we should make the most good for the most people, or whether we must never do something that is wrong, even to stop something much worse from happening.

english_query: how the way choices are shown can change what you pick
ugf_response:
if you think about different things. in a simple way that looks at only some parts of the whole, like choosing which drink to take because it is the first thing or the second thing, there is no single way to always pick the same best thing. let us look at a set of ways to show these things. imagine you have two boxes. the first box has ten pieces of food that people eat. it says that eight out of ten pieces of the sweet stuff are good and one is bad. this makes you want to buy it. the second box has twenty pieces of food and one is good. this makes them say that three and four are bad and none are good. even though these two ways of saying the very same thing make you want to do something else, many people will pick the first box. they feel better when they hear about the good things instead of the bad things.

The hard question is why our minds work this way. Why does the way we see a choice change what we pick, even when the truth stays the same? We want to know if we are making choices that are real, or if we are just following the way things are put in front of us. This means our minds do not always see things as they really are. Instead, our minds see things resting on how those things are put together.

some people might say that this happens because our brains are built to stay safe from losing things. When someone tells us about what we might get, we feel a small bit of being happy. When they tell us about what goes wrong, we feel another bit of being afraid. Because of this, we often choose the thing that feels safer than the thing that is new or the thing that takes away what we have. They use the way feelings work to help them decide for us.
